customs_details.ics2_rules_note: As per ICS2 rules: If you would like us to file a full ENS (i.e. incl. house level and/or buyer/seller data), please provide us with the relevant data in your shipping instructions within doc / SI cut off, otherwise please submit the EORI of the next filing party (self-filer / supplementary declarant). Please note that EU customs authorities will require complete ENS data from 1 September 2025. If you do not provide us with your partial ENS data, you will need to make other arrangements to submit the data to the customs authorities. Without complete ENS data, customs authorities at EU ports may not release the cargo.

notes.text: We would once again inform you weight deviation charge is applicable to export shipments, pls refer below link for more details

FOR ICD ORIGINATING BOOKINGS, IN CASE CONTAINERS HANDED OVER AT RESPECTIVE ICDS PRIOR 10 DAYS OF INTENDED/BOOKED VESSEL ARRIVAL, ALL COST OF STORAGE AT ICD/GATEWAY PORTS WOULD BE TO THE ACCOUNT OF CUSTOMER.
PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR SHIPPING INSTRUCTIONS ONLINE IN OUR WEBSITE

legal_terms: All dates/times are best reasonable estimates and may change. The booking confirmation is subject to sealing of container with high security seals by shipper. Container stowage on vessel is in Carrier's discretion.
